message:
feat(runtime): Add Metal GPU acceleration module for macOS

Adds GPU-accelerated tensor operations using Apple's Metal framework,
with automatic CPU fallback for non-macOS platforms.

Key components:
- Comptime platform detection (use_metal = target.os.tag == .macos)
- Objective-C runtime bindings for Metal API (objc.zig)
- Metal device detection and management (device.zig)
- GPU buffer management with shared storage (buffers.zig)
- Shader compilation with SHA256 caching (shaders.zig)
- GPU kernels: matmul (tiled), elementwise ops, reductions

Architecture follows zell pattern: two-step compilation with cache.
CPU fallbacks ensure the same API works on all platforms.
